status: 24-Apr-2026: Publix data migration, training, and go-live planning session confirmed retrofit data is available through Jan 2026 while shutdown data still needs audit. Leak rate calculation was changed to trigger on system addition for EPA compliance. Staggered go-live remains the plan, with internal users first and contractors later, while contractor mobile app enforcement remains an unresolved challenge.

active_risks.text: Historical retrofit and shutdown data gaps require audit before go-live
Contractor mobile app enforcement has no clear resolution yet

open_items.text: Audit historical retrofit and shutdown event data

recent_decisions.text: Leak rate calculation on system addition was approved
Staggered go-live strategy confirmed with internal users before contractors
Training videos will be embedded in the system
